cover.era_chip: 高麗 · 武臣·元 干涉
cover.subtitle:
100년 무신 정권과,
80년 원의 그림자.
cover.imagePrompt: 12th century Goryeo dynasty illustration of the Bohyeonwon coup. Foreground: ONE Korean military officer (Jeong Jung-bu) in dark armor with a long sword raised, standing over fallen civilian officials in white scholarly robes scattered on stone palace floor. Night scene with warm torchlight. Pillars of red wood in background. Color: deep crimson + ink-black + warm orange torch glow. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"정중부 1170 · 공민왕 1356"
시대의 양 끝을 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 무신정권의 권력 기구(도방·교정도감·정방), 대몽 항쟁의 영웅(김윤후·삼별초 배중손), 공민왕 반원 정책(기철 제거·쌍성총관부 회복) 빈출.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized broken sword crossed with a Mongolian spear, suggesting both military rule and Mongol interference. Jade-green + crimson + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
